title: Jeff Bezos is pushing an AI-first Prime Video redesign, and studios may end up paying for it
summary: Amazon’s executive chairman is pushing a redesign of Prime Video, known internally as Lighthouse, meant to turn the streaming service into a high-profile showcase for the hundreds of billions of dollars the company has spent on AI, Reuters reported on Thursday.
